message:
fix(core): auto_tune test fixes + differential_snapshot benchmark (wa-ssm4, wa-3kxe.3)

- Fix calm_metrics() to use values within the 0.95-1.05 deadband of targets
- Fix convergence_on_constant_input proptest: increase to 1000 ticks with
  threshold 50.0 to handle competing-pressure drift toward range bounds
- Remove unused TuningTargets import from auto_tuning benchmark
- Add differential_snapshot Criterion benchmark with 5 groups: capture,
  restore, compact, dirty_tracker, scrollback_updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
